top_signals.title: Lamborghini Urus SE Performante is an even more super SUV
top_signals.summary: Lamborghini has ramped up the power and aggression for its Urus SE SUV, with the launch of a new Performante version. Released 40 years after the original ‘Rambo Lambo’ LM002, the new Urus SE Performante is claimed to be the fastest SUV in the world. Like other Lamborghinis that have received the Performante treatment, the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK lays out tokenized finance roadmap with projected £33 billion annual boost
top_signals.summary: Industry leaders say payment infrastructure must evolve alongside tokenized assets to enable real-time settlement.
